known_options.notes: FOBIK remote; verify the correct part number by VIN and trim level with the dealer.

methods: Use a Lock Decoder/Reader tool to decode the door lock.
Use tryout keys, Baxter Systems Tryout keys set 97 All Locks, or Aero Lock tryout set TO-93.
Remove a door or trunk cylinder and decode it.

Program the remote/transponder and test every customer-facing function before release.

making_key.code_availability: No usable lock code is listed for this system; decode an accessible lock or cylinder when making a mechanical key.

field_notes: PIN access is mentioned for this system; confirm the PIN workflow before connecting a programmer.

service_notes: Use this system record as the job control sheet: verify vehicle identity, blade data, remote/FCC data, and programmer support before work begins.
Use the spacing/depth data in the mechanical key section when cutting the blade; do not rely on screenshot tables.
For remote or proximity systems, verify FCC ID, frequency, button count, and part number before programming.
Check the transponder/chip section before choosing a reusable, clone, or program-new workflow.
PIN access is required or referenced; confirm the PIN source and programmer support before attempting programming.
Dealer or VIN verification is referenced; confirm exact part fitment before ordering.
When all keys are lost, decode the door lock/cylinder or use the listed lock reader path to recover cuts.
If supported by the vehicle, the trunk/hatch cylinder can be used as an alternate decoding source.
Lock part availability is mentioned; verify lock, cylinder, and pin-kit information before parts ordering.

draft.title: 2015-2021 Audi A3 / Q3

job_essentials.Programming path: Use a supported programmer for the exact vehicle. PIN access is required or mentioned.

quick_answer: PIN access appears to be required or mentioned for this system.
Use the sections below to verify blade, FCC/frequency, programming path, decoder references, and final tests before releasing the vehicle.

cutting_setup.cut_track: The left track contains the cuts.
cutting_setup.guide_track: The right track is used only as a guide/clearance track.
cutting_setup.preparation: Pre-cut the left track to all number 1 depths before applying the working-key cut values.

making_key.code_availability: Use the blade, decoder, and method notes below to determine the working key path.
methods: Remove the door cylinder only when decoding in-place is not practical, then decode the wafers/tumblers.
If the door does not provide enough information, use the trunk/hatch cylinder when the vehicle layout supports it.
